scripts.build:android: cd hanjan-app && eas build --platform android --profile production
scripts.build:android:apk: cd hanjan-app && eas build --platform android --profile apk-direct
scripts.build:ios: cd hanjan-app && eas build --platform ios --profile production
scripts.db:migrate: cd hanjan-server && npx prisma migrate dev
scripts.db:seed: cd hanjan-server && npx prisma db seed
